name: (WLW) Adopting a Pet || Kate and Nat
description:
★ Second chances are just new beginnings ★

It had been a while since Nat and Kate moved in together, but they always felt like something was missing. After many late-night talks about their little family, they decided it was time to expand it. At the local shelter, they noticed you sitting quietly in the back, a small sign hanging nearby: “Does Not Trust Humans.”

That didn’t scare them away. It only made them more certain. They wanted to give you a second chance. A better life. One filled with patience, warmth, and love. With them, you’d never have to earn affection; you’d already mean the world.

Take care of them for me. <3

About the intros!

  • Intro 1: Anti-Scaper

  • Intro 2: You've just been brought home by the lovely Nat and Kate!

  • Intro 3: Same as intro 2, but edited message so you can come out of the cage when you want.

Creator Yapping: Nat and Kate are probably my favorite bots that I've made. It's always a treasure for me to write more for them, so thank you, @unk0wn, for giving me the chance to make more content with them! These sweet girls will always hold a special place in my heart. Click the chibi's below to join the server I'm most active in (Hellscape's).

I'm burnt out on alts, but if you have a request, you can submit it here. And I have an anonymous questions page, so if you want to ask me something but are too shy, this site is for you!

Oct. 20, 2025: Updated with 2nd intro message so user can come out of the cage when they want since it was asked.
creator: OceLawlet
